caption: A news broadcast features a panel of men seated at a long desk in a formal setting, with Israeli flags standing in the background. The man on the left wears a white button-down shirt, while the man to his right is dressed in a dark suit with a red tie. Another man, partially visible on the far left, wears a military uniform. The men are seen listening or looking down at the desk, with subtle shifts in their posture and gaze as the scene progresses. A lower-third graphic displays "FOREIGN NEWS" and the headline "NUCLEAR PROGRAMME" in bold, followed by the text "ISRAEL EXPECTS I.A.E.A. TO GIVE IRAN CLEAR WARNING AHEAD". The screen also shows a "SUBSCRIBE" button and the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA". The "plustv" logo appears in the top corners, and Hebrew text is visible on nameplates in front of the speakers.
